runs.output_code: // --- types/index.ts --- import { z } from "zod"; /** * Registration form schema with conditional validation. * * Patterns: * - .superRefine() for cross-field conditional validation * - Conditional fields: otherInfo (contributor), frequency (newsletter) */ export const registrationSchema = z.object({ username: z.string().min(3, "Username must be at least 3 characters"), email: z.string().email("Invalid email format").min(1, "Email is required"), role: z.enum(["user", "admin", "contributor"]), // otherInfo is optional by default; required for contributor via superRefine otherInfo: z.string().optional(), // newsletter enables the frequency field newsletter: z.boolean().optional(), // frequency is optional; required only when newsletter is true frequency: z.enum(["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]).optional(), // bio is always optional bio: z.string().optional(), }).superRefine((data, ctx) => { // otherInfo is required when role is "contributor" if (data.role === "contributor" && !data.otherInfo) { ctx.addIssue({ code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom, message: "Other info is required for contributors", path: ["otherInfo"], }); } // frequency is required when newsletter is true if (data.newsletter === true && !data.frequency) { ctx.addIssue({ code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom, message: "Please select a frequency", path: ["frequency"], }); } }); export type RegistrationFormValues = z.infer; /** * Initial values for the registration form. * All fields must be included to match the schema structure. */ export const registrationInitialValues: RegistrationFormValues = { username: "", email: "", role: "user", otherInfo: "", newsletter: false, frequency: undefined, bio: "", };
